name: Creating Email Campaigns
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The process of creating an email campaign is divided into 4 steps. While you are required to fill out the mandatory fields to move to the next step, you can use the breadcrumb trail to move back and forth between the steps."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": Before creating an email campaign, you must create the contacts (in the form of a list or table, or segment) and content."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Perform the following steps to create an email campaign:
 "}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In the Navigation, go to CAMPAIGNS, select Email Campaigns. On the Email Campaigns page, click CREATE NEW."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"On the Create New Campaign page, click Email Campaign."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In step 1, you enter the campaign-related details. Refer to Step 1 - Campaign Details section of this article."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In step 2, you select the contacts for sending the campaign. Optionally, you can also select the contacts from whom to suppress the campaign. Refer to Step 2 - Contacts section of this article."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In step 3, you select the content for your campaign and check your spam score. Refer to Step 3 - Content section of this article."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In step 4, you select a delivery method and schedule for your campaign. Refer to Step 4 - Schedule section of this article."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"After a campaign is successfully scheduled or sent, you will see a success message."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Campaign Creation - Step 1"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Campaign Details"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Campaign Details page, do the following:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fill in the campaign details. Enter or select value for the following fields:
 "}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tbody","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Field Name","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Mandatory or Optional","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Campaign Name"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Yes"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enter a name for the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Subject"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Yes"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enter a text to be shown as subject of the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Preheader"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enter a summary text that follows the subject line when the email is viewed from the inbox."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Campaign Tags"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select the tag for the campaign. You can select multiple tags for a campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here, you can also create a new tag. Enter a name for the new tag. The drop-down list shows the tag with the Create Tag option next to it. Click the Create Tag option and the tag gets created."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"📋"},{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" The campaign tags are helpful for selecting groups of campaigns when creating a custom report. To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Campaign-Tags","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Campaign Tags"}]},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Address"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Yes"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Enter the physical address of your business. By default, the field is pre-populated with address from you account information."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click Next to move to step 2."}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Campaign Creation - Step 2"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Contacts"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Contacts page, do the following:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select contacts for the campaign. Enter or select values for the following fields:
 "}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tbody","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Field Name","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Mandatory (Yes/No)","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":" Description","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Brands"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select the names of the brands that you want to associate with the campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If a brand is selected, the campaign email header will include the DKIM header associated with the selected brand. Additionally, the masked links will use the brand’s link tracking domain, and the campaign will be sent using the brand’s IP address."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select List"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select the list of contacts that must receive the campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When using Brands, you can only select the lists associated with the selected Brands."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select Segment"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select the segments of contacts that must receive the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select Table "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select the relation tables of contacts that must receive the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"From Name"}]}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":" Yes"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enter the name of the sender."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The value is automatically filled based on the selected list but can be manually overridden. See the notes below the table for key information."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"From Email "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Yes "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enter the email ID of the sender."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The value is automatically filled based on the selected list but can be manually overridden. See the notes below the table for key information."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Reply To "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Yes "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enter the email ID in which you want to receive replies from your contacts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The value is automatically filled based on the selected list but can be manually overridden. See the notes below the table for key information."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":" Language"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":" Yes"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select the language for your system generated links in the campaign."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The value is automatically filled based on the selected list but can be manually overridden. See the notes below the table for key information."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":":"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"
"},{"text":"When using Brands in campaign creation flow, you can only select the lists associated with the selected Brands."},{"text":"
"},{"text":" "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You must select at least one list or segment or table to specify contacts for the campaign."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For autofilled fields, that is From Name, From Email, Reply To, and Language, note that:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You can enter different values manually to replace the autofilled values. However, if you enter values in these fields before selecting a list, then the entered values get overridden when you select a list."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If you are selecting multiple lists, then the fields get populated based on the last selected list."}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Optionally, you can select the contacts to exclude them from receiving the campaign. Enter or select values for the following fields:

(Yes/No)","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":" Description","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select contact that must not receive the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select Suppress you want to exclude from receiving the campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select Suppress Segment"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No "}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select the segment of contacts that must not receive the campaign. "}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select Suppress Secure contacts (in MD5 hash format) that must not receive the campaign."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click Save and then Next to move to step 3."}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Campaign Creation - Step 3"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Content"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Content page, do the following:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select content for the campaign. Enter or select value for the following fields:

Name","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Mandatory (Yes/No)","bold":true}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Content Name"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Select the content for your campaign from the list of existing content."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Show email preview link"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If the toggle is turned on, a text "If you are having trouble viewing this email, click here” is automatically inserted into the top of your campaign."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Dynamic content preview"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"If the toggle is turned on, the dynamic tags are replaced in the content preview and the content is shown as it will appear in the email."}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"Render Preview"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"No"}]},{"type":"td","attributes":{"colspan":"1","rowspan":"1"},"children":[{"text":"See a preview of your campaign content in various email clients including mobile, web browsers, desktop email clients. The previews are available for multiple operating systems and browsers."}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click Spam Check. The spam score must be less than 5 to be able to send the campaign.
"},{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":": If your content has higher spam score, you will see the relevant error message and will have the option to improve the spam score before you can send or schedule the campaign."},{"text":"
"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click Next to move to step 4. "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Campaign Creation - Step 4"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Schedule"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Schedule page, do the following:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Select from the following methods to specify how your campaign is delivered:
 "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Send Now:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends the campaign right away. You will be required to review the campaign information and confirm before the campaign is sent."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Priority Send:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends "},{"text":"the campaign based on user engagement for stronger inbox delivery. The campaign is sent to most engaged users first, while the non-openers receive it in the end."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Timezone Optimization:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends "},{"text":"the campaign to your contacts as per their time zone."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Send-Time Optimization:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends the campaign at your contacts' best day or time based on their "},{"text":"email opening habits"},{"text":".
"},{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":":"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If both Best Time and Best Day check boxes are selected, the campaign is sent at the best day and time as per the contacts’ email opening habits, ignoring the entered date and time."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"For contacts without prior history, the campaign is sent at the date and time selected in the date picker."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Conversion-Time Optimization:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends the campaign at your contacts' best day or time based on their online purchase habits.
"},{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":":"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If both Best Time and Best Day check boxes are selected, the campaign is sent at the best day and time as per the contacts’ online purchase habits, ignoring the entered date and time."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"For contacts without prior history, the campaign is sent at the date and time selected in the date picker"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Recurring:","bold":true},{"text":" Sends the campaign periodically at a specified schedule. "}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Optionally, you can use the Pre-Send Calculation toggle button to start calculating the audience three hours prior to sending the campaign. You can use the option to prevent any possible delays in delivering campaigns that contain a lot of segments or suppressions.
"},{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":":"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Pre-Send Calculation option can be used only if you are scheduling the campaign to be sent after at least three hours. If you enable the Pre-Send Calculation toggle button and schedule the campaign under three hours, you will get an error."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Once the Pre-Send Calculation begins working (three hours before send time), the campaign gets locked and you can no longer edit the campaign details. However, you can edit the items selected in the campaign. For example, you cannot select different content for the campaign, but you can edit the selected content in the content editor."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Optionally, you can send the email as a test email. Enter up to 30 recipients for the test email and click Send Test.
"},{"text":"📋Note","bold":true},{"text":":"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The test email recipients do not have to be from the same contact lists that you have selected for the campaign."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You can select up to 20 contacts in the form of contact lists and manually enter up to 10 contacts in the form of email addresses."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You can select multiple lists for the test email but the total contacts must be limited to 20."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click Review to verify all the details of the campaign."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Once you have verified the campaign information, click Schedule or Send."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
